summary: Multi-brand website featuring Assured Tours & Travels, GST Services, Luminia TechLabs, and other brands with a 'Coming Soon' section. GST Services section is placed last with minimal/brief content.
architectural_notes: GST Services section appears last among all brand sections, with minimal/brief content (limited details available)

existing_features.title: Reorder the sections in App.tsx so that the GSTServicesSection appears last among the brand sections, after AssuredToursSection, LuminiaTechLabsSection, LuminiaCapturesSection, and ComingSoonSection.

Reduce the content in GSTServicesSection.tsx to a brief, minimal presentation: keep the section header and a short one-line description of GST services, but trim service cards down to 3 cards maximum with concise one-line labels and no detailed descriptions.

projectName: Move GST Services section to last position with minimal content
